meta.title: Spiaggia Sabbioni | Riva del Garda - Travel Guide
meta.description: Complete guide to Spiaggia Sabbioni in Riva del Garda. Information, photos, reviews and practical tips for your visit.

hero.title: Spiaggia Sabbioni
hero.subtitle: The most beloved beach of Riva del Garda

intro.title: Overview
intro.description: Spiaggia Sabbioni is one of the most popular and accessible beaches on Lake Garda, located in Riva del Garda in the Autonomous Province of Trento. It offers stunning views of the surrounding mountains and crystal-clear waters.
highlights: Free pebble beach with spacious areas
Panoramic views of the Alps and Lake Garda
Close to the historic centre of Riva del Garda
Perfect for swimming, windsurfing and sailing

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Glimpses of Spiaggia Sabbioni and surroundings

reviews.title: Real Visitor Reviews
reviews.declaration: Ratings and reviews from Google Maps (last updated: 2026). We only show a selection of verified high-rated reviews. To see all complete and latest reviews, click the link below.
reviews.moreReviews: See more reviews on Google Maps

items.name: Marco R.
items.text: Beautiful beach with spectacular mountain views. Clean and crystal-clear water. Perfect for families.

items.name: Anna L.
items.text: A wonderful place to relax. The beach is spacious and well-maintained. Facilities are adequate.

items.name: Giovanni B.
items.text: Great beach, a bit crowded in peak season but well worth it. Incredible views.

items.name: Lucia F.
items.text: The best beach on Lake Garda! Easy to reach, close to the centre. Highly recommended.

items.name: Paolo M.
items.text: Fantastic spot. The water is transparent and the mountain views are unmatched. We will definitely return.

items.name: Elena V.
items.text: Pebble beach, bring water shoes. But the scenery makes up for everything. Beautiful.

items.name: Roberto C.
items.text: A hidden gem. Perfect for those seeking tranquility and nature. The sunset from here is magical.

items.name: Chiara N.
items.text: I love this beach! We come here every summer. Ideal for children and swimming enthusiasts.

tips.title: Visitor Tips
tips.subtitle: Practical information to make the most of Spiaggia Sabbioni

items.title: Best Time to Visit
items.content: June to September for swimming. May and October offer fewer crowds and pleasant temperatures.

items.title: How to Get There
items.content: 5-minute walk from Riva del Garda centre. Parking available nearby.

items.title: What to Bring
items.content: Water shoes (pebble beach), sunscreen, water. Umbrellas and sun loungers available for rent on-site.

items.title: Activities
items.content: Swimming, windsurfing, sailing, stand-up paddle. Lakeside path ideal for walks and cycling.

items.title: Safety
items.content: Generally calm waters, suitable for children. Watch for boats in areas further from shore.

items.title: Nearby
items.content: Visit Riva del Garda old town, La Rocca (civic museum), and Varone Waterfalls a few km away.

map.title: How to Get There
map.address: Via Cristoph Hartung Von Hartungen, 4, 38066 Riva del Garda TN, Italy
